nasb.text: For thus says the Lord: “Behold, one will fly swiftly like an eagle And spread out his wings against Moab.

esv.text: For thus says the Lord: “Behold, one shall fly swiftly like an eagle and spread his wings against Moab;

cnv.text: 因為耶和華這樣說： “看哪！必有一人像大鷹疾飛， 展開翅膀攻擊摩押。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “看啊，敌人必像展翅疾飞的大鹰一样来攻击摩押。
